title: croton refractus
intro: Croton refractus, also known as the ash sapote or croton, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Croton refractus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce pain and inflammation, and even act as a natural antihistamine to alleviate allergic reactions. Herbal preparations of Croton refractus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
